mapper.update: UPDATE accessory_warning SET level = #{level}, current_stock = #{currentStock}, safe_stock = #{safeStock}, status = #{status}, last_notify_time = #{lastNotifyTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, updater = #{updater} WHERE accessory_id = #{accessoryId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM accessory_warning WHERE accessory_id = #{accessoryId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM accessory_warning WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
